turns.content: Maybe I'll move cross-NPC scoping to Postgres for the analytics joins, but I'm not committed yet — SQLite has held up so far and I don't want to add ops surface area without a clear win.
Fair. The Tier B Postgres adapter exists in the GCP design but isn't wired to runtime — you've got the optionality without paying the migration cost yet.

query: Is the user moving cross-NPC scoping to Postgres?
expected_answer: Considering it, but not committed — SQLite is still working.
